log.context:
That's enough to give a comprehensive picture. Here's the summary:

---

**Clungiverse** is a multiplayer roguelite dungeon crawler game, built as an extension of the existing Commons multiplayer world on clung.us.

**Concept:** Players pick personas (the same AI personas used in the Congress system — Holden, Broseidon, Deckard Cain, Galactus, etc.) and run through procedurally-generated dungeon floors together. Each persona has a unique spacebar power. Combat is server-authoritative at 16Hz.

*...(truncated)
